Requirement: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values
Notes: Annual review completed

Requirement: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight
Notes: No formal board security oversight documented

Requirement: Management establishes structure authority and responsibility
The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract develop and retain competent individuals
Notes: Need to document training requirements and security hiring criteria

Requirement: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities
Notes: No formal performance review process for security responsibilities

Requirement: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant quality information
Notes: No formal threat intelligence process or security metrics program

Requirement: The entity internally communicates information
The entity communicates with external parties
Notes: No external communication policy for security incidents or breach notification

Requirement: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity
Notes: No formal risk assessment framework or documented security objectives

Requirement: The entity identifies and analyzes risks
Notes: No risk register exists

Requirement: The entity considers the potential for fraud
Notes: No fraud risk assessment or insider threat program

Requirement: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact internal control
Notes: No change risk assessment process

Requirement: The entity selects develops and performs ongoing and separate evaluations
Notes: GuardDuty enabled but findings not reviewed for 6 months. No SIEM deployed.

Requirement: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies
Notes: No process to escalate or track monitoring findings

Requirement: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to risk mitigation
Notes: Controls not formally documented or mapped to risks

Requirement: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology
Notes: No formal IT general controls documentation

Requirement: The entity deploys control activities through policies and procedures
Notes: Policies exist but are outdated and incomplete. No regular review cycle.

Requirement: The entity implements logical access security over protected information assets
Notes: No centralized access management. Firewall rules and security groups not formally documented.

Requirement: The entity registers and authorizes new users prior to issuing credentials
Notes: No formal user provisioning process. Accounts created ad-hoc.

Requirement: The entity authorizes modifies or removes access based on roles
Notes: No formal access reviews. Contractor accounts persist after engagement ends. No deprovisioning process.

Requirement: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected assets
Evidence Reference: Office access logs; Badge system records
Notes: AWS manages physical security for cloud resources

Requirement: The entity discontinues logical and physical protections over assets only after data recovery ability is diminished
Notes: No asset disposal procedures documented

Requirement: The entity implements logical access security measures against threats from outside system boundaries
Notes: No SIEM. No IDS/IPS. No centralized alerting. GuardDuty enabled but unmonitored.

Requirement: The entity restricts the transmission movement and removal of information
Notes: TLS encryption in transit exists but not formally documented or verified

Requirement: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect unauthorized or malicious software
Notes: No software allowlisting. No MDM for endpoints. Basic antivirus only.

Requirement: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify configuration changes and vulnerabilities
Notes: CloudTrail enabled but logs not reviewed. No vulnerability scanning. No configuration monitoring.

Requirement: The entity monitors system components for anomalies
Notes: GuardDuty findings unreviewed for 6 months. No centralized monitoring dashboard.

Requirement: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in failures
Notes: No incident classification criteria. No triage process documented.

Requirement: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program
Notes: No documented incident response plan. Response is ad-hoc. No IR team defined.

Requirement: The entity identifies develops and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents
Notes: No recovery procedures documented. Backups exist but never tested.

Requirement: The entity authorizes designs develops configures documents tests approves and implements changes
Notes: Terraform used but no formal change approval process. No peer review required. No change advisory board.

Requirement: The entity identifies selects and develops risk mitigation activities for business disruptions
Notes: No vendor risk management program. No business impact analysis.

Requirement: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners
Notes: No vendor security questionnaire process. No vendor compliance reviews.

Requirement: The entity maintains monitors and evaluates current processing capacity
Notes: Auto-scaling not configured. No capacity monitoring documented.

Requirement: The entity authorizes designs develops implements operates approves maintains and monitors environmental protections and recovery infrastructure
Notes: RDS Multi-AZ configured but no DR plan documented. Backup restoration never tested.

Requirement: The entity tests recovery plan procedures supporting system recovery
Notes: Backups run daily (svc-backup-agent) but have never been tested for restoration

Requirement: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information
Notes: No data classification policy. Client financial data and PII not formally classified.

Requirement: The entity disposes of confidential information
Notes: No data retention or disposal policy. No procedures for secure data destruction.

The entity implements policies and procedures over system processing
The entity implements policies and procedures to make available or deliver output
